validate-azure-ad-token.failed-validation-error-message: Unauthorized. Access token is missing or invalid.

inbound.choose:
<when condition="@{
                var jwt = (Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"];
                string currentAppId = (string)context.Variables["currentAppId"];
                
                // 許可リストのパース
                var allowedClients = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("allowedClientIds", "").Split(new[] { ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries).Select(s => s.Trim());
                var allowedGroups = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("allowedGroupIds", "").Split(new[] { ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries).Select(s => s.Trim());

                // クライアントIDのチェック
                bool isClientMatch = allowedClients.Contains(currentAppId);

                // グループIDのチェック (groupsクレームが存在しない場合も考慮)
                var userGroupsRaw = jwt.Claims.GetValueOrDefault("groups", "");
                var userGroups = userGroupsRaw.Split(new[] { ',', ' ' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries).Select(s => s.Trim());
                bool isGroupMatch = userGroups.Any(g => allowedGroups.Contains(g));

                return !(isClientMatch || isGroupMatch);
            }">
                
                    
                    @{
                        return $"Access denied. Required permissions not met.";
                    }
